title: The Dolomites: A Hiker's Paradise

scenes.text: The Dolomites rise dramatically from the earth, stunning any traveler.
These majestic mountains are located in northeastern Italy.
The Dolomites were declared a UNESCO World Heritage Site in 2009.
The diversity of trails attracts both novice and expert hikers.
scenes.label: ENDLESS TRAILS

scenes.text: Follow to see the world's hidden places.

description: 📍 Dolomites, Trentino-Alto Adige - Italy. A breathtaking mountain range perfect for hikers and nature lovers. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
